ingest_command: bcftools view clinvar.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/CLNSIG,INFO/AF_EXAC,INFO/AF_TGP,INFO/CLNVC' | llmap variant-ingest --source clinvar --bucket-bp 100 --tag-pathogenic --output clinvar.priors
notes: Used both as AF source (where AF_EXAC/AF_TGP populated) and as a clinical-relevance tag — pathogenic positions can be flagged for elevated reporting even if AF is low.
